STRAP ATTACHMENT","position":"middle right","count":1,"labels":["Quick-release spring bar system"]},{"title":"feature list left","position":"bottom left","count":4,"labels":["CENDRÉ MINUIT","38mm ROSE GOLD CASE","HAND-FINISHED MOVEMENT","72HR POWER RESERVE"]},{"title":"feature list right","position":"bottom right","count":3,"labels":["ANTI-REFLECTIVE SAPPHIRE","50m WATER RESISTANT","ALLIGATOR LEATHER STRAP"]}],"dividers":"thin gray vertical and horizontal rules separating sections"},"visual_style":{"look":"premium Swiss watch advertisement and technical spec sheet","lighting":"soft studio lighting with realistic metal reflections and subtle shadows","camera":"hero watch shown in large three-quarter front view angled slightly right, strap extending off frame; detailed macro closeups in lower panels","typography":"refined uppercase luxury sans-serif with generous letter spacing","render_quality":"photorealistic, high-end catalog, precise engraving, realistic leather grain, crisp technical diagram lines"}}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"奢华腕表产品规格海报","brand":{"name":"{argument name=\"brand name\" default=\"CENDRÉ MINUIT\"}","tagline":"MANUFACTURE","monogram":"CM"},"subject":{"product":"正装腕表","case":{"diameter":"{argument name=\"case size\" default=\"38mm\"}","material":"{argument name=\"case material\" default=\"玫瑰金\"}","finish":"高抛光暖色玫瑰金调","shape":"圆形超薄表壳，配以优雅的弧形表耳","crown":"镌刻品牌字母组合的凹槽表冠"},"dial":{"color":"{argument name=\"dial color\" default=\"炭黑色\"}","style":"极简扇形纹理表盘","markers":{"count":10,"details":"8 枚纤细条形刻度，12、3、9 点位为阿拉伯数字，6 点位因小秒盘无刻度"},"hands":"叶形玫瑰金时针和分针","subdials":{"count":1,"type":"6 点位小秒盘"},"text":["CENDRÉ MINUIT","MANUFACTURE","SWISS MADE"]},"strap":{"material":"{argument name=\"strap material\" default=\"黑色鳄鱼皮\"}","color":"黑色","attachment":"快拆生耳系统"},"movement":{"type":"机械手工打磨机芯","visible_caseback":true,"power_reserve":"72 小时"}},"layout":{"background":"柔和暖灰色，画布四周环绕纤细双线边框","orientation":"竖版海报","sections":[{"title":"主视觉产品图","position":"顶部","count":1,"labels":["主腕表"]},{"title":"1. 手工打磨机芯","position":"中左","count":1,"labels":["透过蓝宝石底盖可见"]},{"title":"2. 表壳结构","position":"中中","count":1,"labels":["横截面视图","总厚度 10.25mm","1.80mm 蓝宝石水晶玻璃（防反射）","7.45mm 表壳中框","0.90mm 蓝宝石底盖（防反射）"]},{"title":"3. 表带连接","position":"中右","count":1,"labels":["快拆生耳系统"]},{"title":"左侧功能列表","position":"底部左侧","count":4,"labels":["CENDRÉ MINUIT","38mm 玫瑰金表壳","手工打磨机芯","72 小时动力储备"]},{"title":"右侧功能列表","position":"底部右侧","count":3,"labels":["防反射蓝宝石玻璃","50 米防水","鳄鱼皮表带"]}],"dividers":"纤细的灰色垂直和水平线分隔各区域"},"visual_style":{"look":"高端瑞士腕表广告及技术规格表","lighting":"柔和摄影棚灯光，呈现逼真的金属反射与细腻阴影","camera":"主腕表以大尺寸四分之三正面视角呈现，略向右倾斜，表带延伸至画框外；下方板块展示精细微距特写","typography":"精致的大写奢华无衬线字体，字间距宽裕","render_quality":"照片级真实感，高端产品目录品质，精准的镌刻细节，逼真的皮革纹理，清晰的技术图解线条"}}

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华腕表技术海报：一款专为奢华机械腕表设计的高端产品海报，将精美的主视觉图与技术图解及功能标注相结合，适用于品牌宣传活动或产品目录页面。
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, minimalist, luxury, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
